_doc: Per-sample error-count baselines for the htmlx_fixtures suite. Many samples reference undeclared identifiers by design (e.g. `{#each items as item}` has no surrounding <script> declaring `items`), so tsgo reports TS2304 `Cannot find name` on every run. Baselines capture the expected noise floor; a pass means `errors ‚Č§ max_errors`. The first authoritative run populates this file; subsequent edits to emit should never increase any entry's count without an explicit baseline bump and a comment explaining why.

attachments.v5.reason: bootstrap baseline ‚ÄĒ samples reference undeclared identifiers by design (no surrounding <script> providing `items`/`Input`/`Component`/etc.); emit-shape test for upstream, type-check noise for us
